access_lifetime.description: Lifetime of an OAuth2 access token

access_token_lifetime.description: Specify the lifetime of an OAuth2 access token

access_token_lifetime_units.description: Specify the lifetime of an OAuth2 access token

client_description.description: Use this field to store comments or notes about this API client

client_id.description: The unique string identifying this API client.  Use this value in the OAuth2 “client_id” parameter

client_public.description: Public clients have no client secret

client_refresh.description:
An OAuth2 refresh token may be used to obtain an updated access token.
Use grant_type=refresh_token for this

client_secret.description: Use this value in the OAuth2 “client_secret” parameter. NOTE: This value is encrypted when stored and cannot be retrieved.

grant_types.description: Only the selected authentication method will be permitted for use with this client ID

id.description: The unique string identifying this API client.  Use this value in the OAuth2 “client_id” parameter

profile_id.description:
The operator profile applies role-based access control to authorized OAuth2 clients.
This determines what API objects and methods are available for use

refresh_lifetime.description: Lifetime of an OAuth2 refresh token

refresh_token_lifetime.description: Specify the lifetime of an OAuth2 refresh token

refresh_token_lifetime_units.description: Specify the lifetime of an OAuth2 refresh token
